summary.en-US: Unofficial companion that syncs LeetCode browser cookies to the VS Code auth-sync extension running on localhost.

description.en-US: Unofficial companion browser extension for LeetCode with Auth Sync. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or published by LeetCode. It sends your signed-in leetcode.com session cookie to the local VS Code extension listener on 127.0.0.1 so VS Code can reuse your browser session.

release_notes.en-US: Updates the LeetCode VS Code Auth Sync browser extension.
